name: Quiche with Saltine Crust
recipeIngredient: 5 ounces imitation crab or turkey ham, finely diced
1 can mushrooms drained, liquid reserved (4 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure 1 cup saltine crumbs; reserve remaining for topping. Mix with melted margarine.
2. Pat mixture into bottom and sides of a 10 inch pie plate.
3. Layer crab or ham, onion, mushrooms and 8 ounces of cheese (reserve remaining for top) carefully on crust in order listed.
4. Mix eggs, sour cream and mushroom liquid; pour over filling.
5. Sprinkle remaining crumbs on top.
6. Top with remaining 2 ounces Swiss cheese.
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 35-40 minutes until middle is set. Let cool 10 minutes before serving.
